{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Iron King's Grand Hive
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Iron King's Grand Hive]] is the target of a suicide mission.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c40">''The Captain'', chapter 40</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
